content: Local RAG with llama-server: standard shape is local GGUF -> llama-server OpenAI-compatible API (/v1/chat/completions, /v1/embeddings) -> app talks HTTP only, swapping base_url. Embedding and generation commonly run as separate server instances/ports (embedding server needs --embeddings flag and its own model). Production pattern separates write path (embed/index) from read path (retrieve/generate). Validates Sift's single HTTP client with per-role base_url.
